message:
feat(core): add unified e2e artifact validation framework with schema-enforced invariants

Introduce a comprehensive validation layer for e2e artifact bundles that
enforces structural correctness at the type level rather than relying on
ad-hoc runtime checks scattered across test suites.

New public API surface:
- E2eArtifactValidationError: 11-variant error enum covering schema version
  mismatch, tag mismatch, invalid ULID run IDs, missing required artifacts,
  duplicate entries, JSONL line_count presence/absence, event field requirements,
  oracle check fields, and reason_code namespace validation.
- validate_envelope(): Checks schema version, schema tag discriminator, and
  26-character Crockford ULID format for run_id.
- validate_manifest_envelope() / validate_manifest_body(): Full manifest
  validation including structured_events.jsonl presence, failure artifact
  requirements (artifacts_index.json + replay_command.txt for failed runs,
  terminal_transcript.txt for failed ops/UI runs), JSONL line_count enforcement,
  and duplicate entry detection.
- validate_event_envelope() / validate_event_body(): Event validation including
  lane_id requirements for lane tests, oracle_id + outcome for oracle checks,
  reason_code requirements for fail/skip outcomes, and e2e namespace pattern
  matching for reason codes.
- Schema discriminator constants (E2E_SCHEMA_MANIFEST, E2E_SCHEMA_EVENT, etc.)
  and mandatory artifact filename constants.
- Eq derives added to 13 e2e types (E2eEnvelope, ManifestBody, ModelVersion,
  Platform, ArtifactEntry, Correlation, OracleReportBody, LaneReport,
  OracleVerdictRecord, ReportTotals, ReplayBody, SnapshotDiffBody, DiffEntry).
- Case-insensitive .jsonl extension detection via rsplit_once + eq_ignore_ascii_case.
- is_valid_ulid_byte made const fn.

All new validators have comprehensive test coverage (19 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
